# openshift_mirror_registry (Resource)

Sets up a local mirror registry for disconnected OpenShift installation.



## Example Usage

### Quay mirror registry on a bastion host

Deploys the `mirror-registry` (single-node Quay) tool on the bastion. A self-signed TLS certificate is generated automatically if `tls_cert_file` is omitted. Pass the `ca_cert` output to `openshift_cluster` as `additional_trust_bundle` and reference `registry_url` in `image_content_sources` so nodes trust and use the mirror during installation.

```hcl
resource "openshift_mirror_registry" "bastion" {
  hostname    = "bastion.example.internal"
  storage_dir = "/opt/registry/data"
  type        = "quay"
  port        = 8443

  init_user     = "admin"
  init_password = var.registry_password
}

output "registry_url" {
  value = openshift_mirror_registry.bastion.registry_url
}

# Use the CA and registry URL when creating the cluster.
resource "openshift_cluster" "airgapped" {
  cluster_name         = "airgapped"
  base_dns_domain      = "example.internal"
  openshift_version    = "4.16"
  pull_secret          = var.pull_secret
  ssh_public_key       = var.ssh_public_key

  api_vip              = "192.168.10.10"
  ingress_vip          = "192.168.10.11"
  machine_network_cidr = "192.168.10.0/24"

  create_infra_env        = true
  auto_install            = false
  additional_trust_bundle = openshift_mirror_registry.bastion.ca_cert

  image_content_sources {
    source  = "quay.io/openshift-release-dev/ocp-release"
    mirrors = ["${openshift_mirror_registry.bastion.registry_url}/openshift-release-dev/ocp-release"]
  }

  image_content_sources {
    source  = "quay.io/openshift-release-dev/ocp-v4.0-art-dev"
    mirrors = ["${openshift_mirror_registry.bastion.registry_url}/openshift-release-dev/ocp-v4.0-art-dev"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostname` (String) FQDN of the registry host.
- `storage_dir` (String) Local directory for registry storage.

### Optional

- `init_password` (String, Sensitive) Initial registry admin password.
- `init_user` (String) Initial registry admin username.
- `port` (Number) Registry port.
- `quay_root` (String) Quay root installation directory (for type=quay).
- `tls_cert_file` (String) Path to TLS certificate file (PEM). If omitted, a self-signed cert is generated.
- `tls_key_file` (String) Path to TLS private key file (PEM).
- `type` (String) Registry type: 'quay' (mirror-registry) or 'docker'.

### Read-Only

- `ca_cert` (String) PEM-encoded CA certificate for the registry TLS (self-signed if generated).
- `registry_url` (String) Full registry URL (e.g. registry.example.com:5000).
